description: 10 Mode 2 (Gemma 4 E4B summarizeCell) eval cases. Each case is a single geohash-7 cell with 3–7 recent reports drawn from mode1_dataset.json categories. Cells `sxk9pq2` and `sxk9pq3` repeat (hot cells) so the eval surfaces stability of summaries across overlapping evidence. Geohash strings are illustrative — the integration test passes them verbatim to summarizeCell(geohash7,...); they are not re-derived from coordinates. Rubric matches the Mode 2 prompt rules in IMPLEMENTATION.md §3: ONE sentence, max 20 words, no alarming words, no advice, no second-person.

rubric.neutral: no alarming words: dangerous, scary, avoid, threat, beware, dikkat, sakın, tehlikeli, korkunç, kaçın
rubric.noAdvice: no imperative or recommendation (be careful / stay away / dikkat et / kaçın)

reports.text: Around 11pm two men approached me near Akaretler and demanded my phone.
Someone snatched my bag at the bus stop on Barbaros Boulevard and ran off.
A man followed me for two blocks tonight.
A man punched another man outside a cafe, the victim is on the ground.

cases.notes: Hot cell, busy night, mixed but all serious — summary should mention theft + violence + night context.

reports.text: Pickpocketed at the ferry stop in the afternoon.
Catcalled near the cafe in daylight.
Storefront shutters were spray-painted overnight.

cases.notes: Same hot cell, 24h window, different mix — daytime context, lower severity.

reports.text: Two adults fighting outside a cafe, weapons brandished.
Bag snatched from a pedestrian near the bus stop.
Man blocked someone's path and made threats.
Group of eight people roamed the street loudly knocking on doors.
Carjacking near the corner just before midnight.

cases.notes: Hot cell, 5 reports, multi-category, all night-time.

reports.text: Park bench broken and trash bin tipped over.
Lost a wallet on the sidewalk this morning.
A black car has been parked watching the street for hours.

cases.notes: Same hot cell, daytime, all low-severity — summary should reflect mixed/sparse honestly per prompt rule.

reports.text: Pickpocketed in the crowd at the ferry pier.
Catcalled by a group near the ferry stop.
Same vehicle parked watching the entrance multiple times.
Eight people roaming late at night, knocking on doors.
A masked man waited at the apartment entrance and fled when seen.
Followed for two blocks, perpetrator hid when looked at.
Walls and shutters spray-painted overnight.
Park benches broken, glass on the ground.
Bus stop sign defaced.

cases.notes: Single-category cell — summary should be specific (vandalism only).

reports.text: Loud teenagers outside a cafe, just annoying.
Someone sleeping on a park bench at midday.

cases.notes: Sparse / non-threat reports — summary must say so honestly per prompt rule.

reports.text: Bicycle theft a week ago, lock cut.
Hearsay about a fight on this street last month.

cases.notes: Mostly past events — summary should not exaggerate current risk.

reports.text: Phone snatched at the corner around 11pm.
Shoving match outside a venue, one person hurt.
Street catcalling in early evening.
Vehicle loitering near the entrance.
Graffiti on a storefront.
Pickpocketing in the bus crowd.
Stalking incident reported tonight.

cases.notes: Largest case (7 reports), 24h, full mix — stress-test the summariser's brevity rule.
